NavBar.searchPlaceholder: Search fine line tattoos: floral, moon, butterfly...

Landing.subtitle: Tattoo inspo to find your next perfect tattoo
Landing.section2Body: Search by style, body area or motif. Thousands of fine line and microrealism tattoos updated every day.
Landing.section3Body: Save the tattoos you love and organize them your way. "Right arm", "Someday", "Summer ideas"...
Landing.section4Title:
Are you a tattoo artist
or own a studio?
Landing.section4Body1: Upload all your fine line work. If it's not here, it doesn't exist.
Landing.section4Body2: AI tags your photos automatically. Upload 20 photos at once and appear in searches.
Landing.section5Body: Tattoo artists, studios and fine line lovers in one place.

Onboarding.step0Title: How will you use the app?
Onboarding.step0Subtitle: This personalizes your experience. You can change it later.
Onboarding.opt1Desc: Upload your work and get clients
Onboarding.step1Subtitle: Follow tattoo artists to see their work in your daily feed
Onboarding.step2Subtitle: Upload your first tattoos to appear in your followers' feed
